title: Buttery Crumbly Japanese Millet Crumble
description: A raw-friendly and date-night suitable dish featuring millet combined with a tadka for a buttery crumbly texture.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup unsalted cashews, finely crushed
ingredients.notes: Opt for raw or minimally processed if desired

ingredients.name: 1 tablespoon ground roasted peanuts (optional)
ingredients.notes: Use raw or roasted, as desired

ingredients.name: Garnish (optional): a few fresh mint leaves or edible flowers

instructions: In a medium saucepan, bring water to a boil. Add millet and simmer until tender, about 20 minutes. Drain excess liquid and let cool.
Stir in crushed cashews, salt, lemon juice, and finely chopped dates into the cooled millet mixture. Mix well.
Press crumble into the bottom of a greased or non-stick baking dish. Sprinkle ground roasted peanuts (if using) evenly over the top for added crunch.
Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 20 minutes, until golden brown and bubbly on top.
Remove from oven and let cool slightly before serving with garnishes if desired.
